languages.text: "Сюда должны были явиться войска рода Гапрак. Не знаешь, что с ними случилось?"
"Forces from House Gaprak were supposed to arrive here. Do you know what happened to them?"
languages.original_text: "Сюда должны были явиться войска рода Гапрак. Не знаешь, что с ними случилось?"

traits.locale_text: "Forces from House Gaprak were supposed to arrive here. Do you know what happened to them?"
"Forces from House Gaprak were supposed to arrive here. Do you know what happened to them?"
"Forces from House Gaprak were supposed to arrive here. Do you know what happened to them?"

languages.text: «Deberían haber llegado fuerzas de la casa Gaprak. ¿Sabe qué les ha ocurrido?».
languages.original_text: "Forces from House Gaprak were supposed to arrive here. Do you know what happened to them?"

traits.locale_text: «Deberían haber llegado fuerzas de la casa Gaprak. ¿Sabe qué les ha ocurrido?».

languages.text: “按理说，贾帕克家族的部队早该到这里了。你知道他们出了什么事吗？”
languages.original_text: "Forces from House Gaprak were supposed to arrive here. Do you know what happened to them?"

traits.locale_text: “按理说，贾帕克家族的部队早该到这里了。你知道他们出了什么事吗？”

languages.text: « Les forces de la maison Gaprak étaient censées débarquer ici. Savez-vous ce qui leur est arrivé ? »
languages.original_text: "Forces from House Gaprak were supposed to arrive here. Do you know what happened to them?"

traits.locale_text: « Les forces de la maison Gaprak étaient censées débarquer ici. Savez-vous ce qui leur est arrivé ? »

languages.text: "Gaprak Hanesi kuvvetlerinin buraya gelmesi gerekiyordu. Onlara ne olduğunu biliyor musun?"
languages.original_text: "Forces from House Gaprak were supposed to arrive here. Do you know what happened to them?"

traits.locale_text: "Gaprak Hanesi kuvvetlerinin buraya gelmesi gerekiyordu. Onlara ne olduğunu biliyor musun?"

languages.text: "Hier hätten Truppen von Haus Gaprak eintreffen sollen. Wisst Ihr, was aus ihnen geworden ist?"
languages.original_text: "Forces from House Gaprak were supposed to arrive here. Do you know what happened to them?"

traits.locale_text: "Hier hätten Truppen von Haus Gaprak eintreffen sollen. Wisst Ihr, was aus ihnen geworden ist?"

languages.text: 「ハウス・ガプラクの兵士がここに来るはずだった。彼らはどうなったか知っているか？」
languages.original_text: "Forces from House Gaprak were supposed to arrive here. Do you know what happened to them?"

traits.locale_text: 「ハウス・ガプラクの兵士がここに来るはずだった。彼らはどうなったか知っているか？」
